SELECT s1."Id", s1."Content", s1."CorrectAnswerId", s1."Image", s0."Id", s0."AnswerIndex", s0."Content", s0."SpecialQuestionId"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."Content", s."CorrectAnswerId", s."Image", gen_random_uuid() AS c
    FROM "SpecialQuestions" AS s
    ORDER BY gen_random_uuid()
    LIMIT @p
) AS s1
LEFT JOIN "SpecialAnswers" AS s0 ON s1."Id" = s0."SpecialQuestionId"
ORDER BY s1.c, s1."Id"

FROM "BaseQuestions" AS b
LEFT JOIN "BaseAnswers" AS b0 ON b."Id" = b0."BaseQuestionId"
WHERE b."Id" = ANY (@ids)
ORDER BY b."Id"
